name: Endstack
long_description:
Endstack is a desktop OS optimized for humans and agents running in the cloud.

Your desktop is powered by endOS, giving you a real desktop workspace in the browser backed by Linux in the cloud. Files, notes, browser tabs, native apps, terminals, and all your agents in one beautiful, familiar, interface.

You get a powerful agent running 24/7, integrated at the system level into endOS that you can also reach via Slack, email, or SMS. 

Endstack desktops are also natively multiplayer, allowing for realtime collaboration with teammates.
one_liner: Cloud desktop OS for humans and agents
